endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/disks
endpoints.description: Lists all the disks under a subscription.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/snapshots
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/disks
endpoints.description: Lists all the disks under a resource group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/disks/{diskName}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DISKNAME}} with a real diskname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DISKNAME}} with a real diskname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DISKNAME}} with a real diskname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
